userStories.title: Precheck types and check implementations
userStories.description: Create src/precheck/types.ts with PrecheckResult, CheckStatus, CheckTier types. Create src/precheck/checks.ts with individual check implementations. Tier 1 blockers: git repo exists, working tree clean, no stale lock (>2h), PRD valid (required fields: id, title, description), Claude CLI available, dependencies installed (detect node_modules/target/venv/vendor), test/lint/typecheck commands work (from config, skip if not configured), git user configured. Tier 2 warnings: CLAUDE.md exists, disk space >1GB, pending stories exist, missing optional commands. Each check returns {name, tier, passed, message}. Tier 2 warning: .gitignore exists and covers nax runtime files (nax.lock, nax/features/*/runs/, test/tmp/).
acceptanceCriteria: PrecheckResult type includes blockers[] and warnings[] arrays
Git repo check uses git rev-parse --git-dir
Working tree check uses git status --porcelain
Stale lock detection: nax.lock older than 2 hours
PRD validation checks id, title, description per story
PRD auto-defaults missing optional fields in-memory (tags=[], status=pending, storyPoints=1)
Claude CLI check runs claude --version
Dependency detection is language-aware (node_modules, target, venv, vendor)
Test/lint/typecheck commands read from config.execution
Commands set to null/false are skipped silently
Disk space warning triggers below 1GB
.gitignore warning if missing or does not cover nax.lock, runs/, test/tmp/

userStories.title: Precheck orchestrator with formatted output
userStories.description: Create src/precheck/index.ts. Runs all checks from checks.ts in order. Stops on first Tier 1 blocker (fail-fast). Collects all Tier 2 warnings. Formats human-readable output with emoji indicators (checkmark/cross/warning). Supports --json flag for machine-readable output. Returns summary with counts (checks, passed, failed, warnings).
acceptanceCriteria: Runs Tier 1 checks first, stops on first failure
Runs all Tier 2 checks even if some warn
Human output shows emoji per check result
JSON output matches spec schema (passed, blockers, warnings, summary, feature)
Exit code 0 for pass, 1 for blocker, 2 for invalid PRD
Summary line shows total checks/passed/failed/warnings

userStories.title: CLI nax precheck command with --json flag
userStories.description: Create src/commands/precheck.ts, register in CLI (bin/nax.ts). Uses resolveProject() from US-001 of v0.12.0. Supports -f <feature>, -d <dir>, --json flags. Runs precheck orchestrator and displays results. Uses same project resolver as nax status/logs.
acceptanceCriteria: Registered as nax precheck subcommand
Uses resolveProject() for directory resolution
-f flag specifies feature to validate
-d flag specifies working directory
--json flag outputs machine-readable JSON
Without --json shows human-friendly formatted output
Exit codes: 0=pass, 1=blocker, 2=invalid PRD

userStories.title: Integrate precheck into nax run
userStories.description: Modify src/execution/runner.ts to run precheck before story execution loop. If precheck fails (any Tier 1 blocker), abort run with clear error message pointing to nax precheck for details. Warnings are logged but execution continues. Add --skip-precheck flag to bypass (for advanced users).
acceptanceCriteria: Precheck runs automatically before first story
Tier 1 blocker aborts run with descriptive error
Tier 2 warnings logged but don't block execution
--skip-precheck flag bypasses all checks
Precheck results included in run JSONL log
Failed precheck updates status.json with precheck-failed status

userStories.title: Config-driven review commands replacing hardcoded lint
userStories.description: Modify src/pipeline/stages/review/runner.ts to use config-driven command resolution instead of hardcoded 'bun run lint'. Resolution order: 1) explicit config.execution.lintCommand, 2) package.json has 'lint' script -> 'bun run lint', 3) not found -> skip with warning. Same for typecheckCommand. Setting to null explicitly disables. This fixes BUG-005.
acceptanceCriteria: Review stage reads lintCommand from config.execution
Review stage reads typecheckCommand from config.execution
Resolution order: config -> package.json -> skip
Setting command to null/false explicitly disables it
Missing command logs warning instead of failing
Config schema updated with lintCommand and typecheckCommand fields
BUG-005 (hardcoded bun run lint) is resolved

userStories.title: PRD auto-default and router tags fix
userStories.description: Fix src/routing/router.ts line ~277 to use tags ?? [] as defensive fallback (prevents crash on missing tags). During precheck and run initialization, auto-default missing optional PRD fields in-memory: tags->[], status->pending, storyPoints->1, acceptanceCriteria->[]. Do not modify the PRD file on disk. This fixes BUG-004 properly at the source.
acceptanceCriteria: Router uses tags ?? [] for spread operations
PRD loader auto-defaults tags=[] when missing
PRD loader auto-defaults status=pending when missing
PRD loader auto-defaults storyPoints=1 when missing
PRD file on disk is not modified
Existing values are preserved (only fills missing)
